title: Notification for Authority to filed EM by Manufacturing Medium Enterprises / Details of the authority with which the memorandum shall be filed by a person who intends to establish or has already established a medium enterprise.

[F. No. 2(10)12006-MSMEPOL] JAWHAR SIRCAR, Add!. Secy.
